name: Nicola Cavanis
description:
Nicola Cavanis (born. 17th. December 1998) is a German model and Influencer.
Cavanis mainly works as a laundry model. Among other things, she received orders for companies and brands Puma, Victoria's Secret, MCM from Modern Creation Munich, Zalando, Sans Complexe, Women’s Secret, New Yorker, S-shaped, s'Oliver, Empreinte, Tchibo, Cupshe, Lanasia, Ysabel Mora and the Golay-Buchel Holding counting Oro Vivo.[4] In September 2019 she was on the cover of the Shape Germany,[4] in February 2021 she made a commercial for Nivea.[1] In 2023, Cavanis was a model at the Cruise fashion show of the French laundry manufacturer Etam,[5] Campaign face of InStyle,[6] and in the Vogue Germany for a shoot for Lacoste to see.[7]

On her Instagram-Profile followed by more than 1.6 million followers.[8th] Nicola Cavanis lives in Munich.
creator: Dorashil
